nptel.name: NPTEL
nptel.description: IIT & IISc courses with government certification. Highly valued by Indian recruiters.
nptel.recognized_by: All major Indian companies and PSUs

courses.title: Programming in Python
courses.reason: Builds strong Python fundamentals needed for most tech roles

courses.title: Introduction to Machine Learning
courses.reason: IIT-level ML cert that stands out on resumes

courses.title: Database Management Systems
courses.reason: DBMS is tested in almost every placement aptitude round

courses.title: Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA)
courses.reason: Core skill for technical interviews at product companies

courses.title: Soft Skills for Placement
courses.reason: Improves communication, interview readiness and group discussion skills

courses.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
courses.reason: Google-backed, directly hirable certificate for analytics roles

courses.title: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
courses.reason: 10-course IBM badge covering Python, SQL, ML, and capstone project

courses.title: Deep Learning Specialization (DeepLearning.AI)
courses.reason: Andrew Ng's course — the gold standard for AI/ML interviews globally

courses.title: Python for Everybody (University of Michigan)
courses.reason: Perfect starting point for students with weak programming fundamentals

udemy.description: Affordable practical courses with lifetime access. Best for hands-on skill building.

courses.title: The Complete Python Bootcamp

courses.title: Machine Learning A-Z: Python & R

courses.reason: Covers HTML, CSS, JS, Node.js — a complete full-stack foundation

courses.title: 100 Days of Code: Python Pro Bootcamp
courses.reason: 100 daily mini-projects prove consistency and hands-on skill

courses.title: Communication Skills Masterclass
courses.reason: Targeted for HR interviews, GD rounds, and workplace communication

courses.title: Programming with Python

hackathons.description: Competitive events that give real-world problem solving experience and team skills in 24–48 hours.
